Package neqsim.process.diagnostics

Class Hypothesis.Evidence

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.diagnostics.Hypothesis.Evidence
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
Enclosing class:
Hypothesis
public static class Hypothesis.Evidence extends Object implements Serializable
A single piece of evidence for or against a hypothesis.

      private final String sourceReference

  • Constructor Details

    • Evidence

      public Evidence(String parameter, String observation, Hypothesis.EvidenceStrength strength, String source)
      Creates an evidence item.
      Parameters:
      parameter - parameter name (e.g., "discharge_temperature")
      observation - what was observed (e.g., "increasing trend, +5 C over 30 days")
      strength - how strongly this supports the hypothesis
      source - data source (e.g., "historian", "STID", "simulation")

    • Evidence

      public Evidence(String parameter, String observation, Hypothesis.EvidenceStrength strength, String source, boolean supporting, double weight, String sourceReference)
      Creates an evidence item with explicit support direction and weight.
      Parameters:
      parameter - parameter name, tag alias, or design key
      observation - what was observed
      strength - strength of the evidence
      source - data source or analysis method
      supporting - true if the evidence supports the hypothesis, false if contradictory
      weight - relative weight, normally 0.1 to 5.0
      sourceReference - optional document, tag, or data-window reference

  • Method Details

    • getParameter

      public String getParameter()
      Gets the parameter name.
      Returns:
      parameter name

    • getObservation

      public String getObservation()
      Gets the observation description.
      Returns:
      observation text

    • getStrength

      public Hypothesis.EvidenceStrength getStrength()
      Gets the evidence strength.
      Returns:
      evidence strength

    • getSource

      public String getSource()
      Gets the data source.
      Returns:
      source identifier

    • isSupporting

      public boolean isSupporting()
      Checks if the evidence supports the hypothesis.
      Returns:
      true when supporting, false when contradictory

    • getWeight

      public double getWeight()
      Gets the relative evidence weight.
      Returns:
      evidence weight

    • getSourceReference

      public String getSourceReference()
      Gets the source reference.
      Returns:
      document, tag, or time-window reference, or an empty string
